news.title: Trump says Iran will be bombed at a 'much higher level' if it doesn't agree to peace deal
news.summary: Washington reportedly expects responses from Tehran on several key points within the next 48 hours. Washington reportedly expect responses from Iran on key points in next 48 days.

news.title: Uber and Disney are seeing the same remarkable dynamic in this economy. Both stocks are surging
news.summary: Uber and Disney pointed to a resilient spending backdrop. Consumers continue to shell out for rides, food delivery, vacations and theme park trips.

news.title: AMD's Su explains what's behind massive forecast change as stock roars 15% on earnings
news.summary: CEO Lisa Su highlighted the growing demand for central processing units. Su doubled her long term forecast after strong first-quarter earnings. Su: "We have a long way to go, but we are on the right track"

news.title: Commerce Sec. Howard Lutnick to answer Epstein questions from House panel Wednesday
news.summary: Howard Lutnick admitted to a Senate committee in February that he and his family visited Epstein's private island in the U.S. Virgin Islands in 2012.

news.title: Nvidia, Corning partner on massive optical fiber deal that may be a game changer for AI
news.summary: Corning is opening three new advanced manufacturing plants in the U.S. dedicated entirely to optical technologies for Nvidia. Corning will also be opening new optical manufacturing facilities in Europe and Asia.

news.title: Oil prices bounce off lows as an Iran-war peace deal may be just a ‘structured pause’
news.summary: President Donald Trump said his latest effort to partially reopen the Strait of Hormuz would be paused. The move is to buy more time to reach an agreement to end hostilities with Iran.

news.title: If stocks are to continue rising, energy prices need to start falling, Barclays says
news.summary: Barclays: Markets displaying a dangerous degree of complacency. Risk appetite needs a resolution in the Middle East, the bank says.

news.title: Here’s the real reason South Korea has the hottest stock market in the world
news.summary: South Korean stocks shot up another 6% on Wednesday and Samsung Electronics reached $1 trillion in market cap. Kospi index surge 75% this year and nearly triple over the last 52 weeks.

news.title: Stocks are losing their edge over bonds, in an ominous sign for the market
news.summary: The extra return that investors receive for the additional risk of owning stocks over bonds has been fading. That is making some on Wall Street nervous that investors might be too complacent.

news.title: Nvidia’s new deal with Corning validates one of the hottest AI trends out there
news.summary: Optical components are increasingly in short supply, and Nvidia is partnering with key players to gain an edge. Nvidia is working with a number of companies to develop new optical components.
